title: Euclid's Data
body: Data (Greek: Δεδομένα, Dedomena) is a work by Euclid.  It deals with the nature and implications of "given" information in geometrical problems. The subject matter is closely related to the first four books of Euclid's Elements. The book contains 15 definitions and 94 propositions.
categories: Articles needing translation from Catalan Wikipedia
